Demo Pricing Roadmap Sign In

Modern Presentations
in Your Browser

ShowTime Lite is a cloud-based slide creation tool that lets you design stunning presentations with real-time preview and export capabilities. No install required – just create, collaborate, and share.

Try Demo View Pricing

Interactive Demo

See ShowTime Lite in action with a static preview.

Launch Interactive Demo

Cloud-first today, desktop next

Create slides directly in the browser, export to PNG, PDF, or JSON, and follow the path toward offline editing and team workflows.

What’s here today

  • Cloud-based slide editor
  • Dark and light themes
  • Export to PNG, PDF, JSON
  • Charts, diagrams, and code blocks
  • Presentation mode

Coming soon

  • Q3 2026 Desktop app with offline support
  • Q4 2026 Real-time collaboration
  • 2027 Custom themes and AI-powered templates

Pricing and access

Start with the free plan now. Pro and Enterprise access will open as collaboration and desktop features ship.

Free

$0 / month

  • Create and export slides
  • Basic templates
  • PNG and PDF export
  • Community support
Sign In / Start Free

Pro

Soon

  • Advanced themes and templates
  • Cloud storage and history
  • Priority support

Enterprise

Soon

  • Team accounts
  • Real-time collaboration
  • Deployment and support options
